channel.title: Blood on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Blood on PepsFeeder

item.title: Why do we bleed from the nose?
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Nosebleeds or epistaxis is a mild condition, but can sometimes be a sign of an underlying disease. We sometimes bleed from the nose at night or even in the middle of the day and suddenly enough.

item.title: How to read the results of the blood test?
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: A blood test is usually performed as part of a comprehensive medical examination or prior to surgical interventions. However, this analysis includes several vague abbreviations such as LDL, GPT or RBC, whose meaning is difficult to interpret.
